abstract.text: The base class of every mesh message. Mesh messages can be sent to and
received from the mesh network. For messages with the Op Code known
during compilation a
protocol should be preferred.

inlineContent.text: are checked and should be set only for outgoing messages.

abstract.text: A base protocol for acknowledged Configuration messages.
A Private Beacon Get message is an acknowledged message used to get the current
Private Beacon state and Random Update Interval Steps state of a Node.
A base protocol for config messages with Virtual Label property.
A base protocol for vendor messages.
The Firmware Update Apply message is an acknowledged message used to apply
a firmware image that has been transferred to a Firmware Update Server.
A
is an unacknowledged message reporting all
s
known to the Node.
A
is an unacknowledged message reporting all
s
bound to requested
that are known to the Node.
The base class of every mesh message. Mesh messages can be sent to and
received from the mesh network. For messages with the Op Code known
during compilation a
protocol should be preferred.
The Firmware Distribution Receivers Delete All message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to remove all entries from the Distribution Receivers List state of
a Firmware Distribution Server.
A
message is an unacknowledged message used to report the current
SAR Receiver state of a Node.
The base class for response messages.
The Firmware Distribution Firmware Delete message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to delete a stored firmware image on a Firmware Distribution Server.
A Remote Provisioning Link Get message is an acknowledged message used by the
Remote Provisioning Client to get the Remote Provisioning Link state of a
Remote Provisioning Server model.
The Firmware Distribution Apply message is an acknowledged message sent from
a Firmware Distribution Client to a Firmware Distribution Server to apply the firmware
image on the Target Nodes.
A Health Period Set is an acknowledged message used to set the current Health Fast Period Divisor
state of an Element.
A base protocol for config messages related to vendor Models.
The Light LC Occupancy Mode Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to
set the Light LC Occupancy Mode state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Start message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to start the firmware image distribution to the Target Nodes
in the Distribution Receivers List.
The Firmware Distribution Suspend message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to suspend the firmware image distribution from a Firmware Distribution Server.
A Private Beacon Status message is an unacknowledged message used to report
the current Private Beacon state and Random Update Interval Steps state of a Node.
The Firmware Distribution Upload Cancel message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to stop a firmware image upload to a Firmware Distribution Server.
The Firmware Update Information Get message is an acknowledged message used
to get information about the firmware images installed on a Node.
Light CTL Temperature Get is an acknowledged message used to get the
Light CTL Temperature state of an Element.
Returns whether the message should be sent or was sent as
Segmented Access Message. By default, this parameter returns
The Config Low Power Node PollTimeout Get is an acknowledged message
used to get the current value of PollTimeout timer of the Low Power
node within a Friend Node.
The message is sent to a Friend Node that has claimed to be handling
messages by sending ACKs On Behalf Of (OBO) the indicated Low Power
Node. This message should only be sent to a Node that has the Friend
feature supported and enabled.
A Health Fault Test Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to invoke a self-test procedure
of an Element.
A Private Node Identity Get message is an acknowledged message used to get the
current Private Node Identity state for a subnet.
The Firmware Update Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by a
Firmware Update Server to report the status of a firmware update.
A base protocol for static acknowledged vendor message.
Application Keys are used to encrypt mesh messages on Access Layer.
The unknown message is returned if no local Model defines
a message type for the received Op Code.
The base class for response messages.
A base protocol for unacknowledged Remote Provisioning messages.
The Light LC Property Set is an acknowledged message used to set the
Light LC Property state of an Element.
The Light CTL Temperature Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message
used to set the Light CTL Temperature state and the Light CTL Delta UV state of an Element.
A
is an acknowledged message used to update a
on
a Node.
The Config Low Power Node PollTimeout Status is an unacknowledged message
used to report the current value of the PollTimeout timer of the Low Power
Node within a Friend Node.
A base protocol for acknowledged vendor message.
A Health Fault Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the current Registered Fault
state of an Element.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Status message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to report the current value of the
Remote Provisioning Scan Parameters state and the Remote Provisioning Scan state
of a Remote Provisioning Server model.
A base protocol for unacknowledged Remote Provisioning messages.
Light LC Occupancy Mode Get is an acknowledged message used to get the
Light LC Occupancy Mode state of an Element.
Light CTL Temperature Range Status is an unacknowledged message used
to report the Light CTL Temperature Range state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Server to report the status of a firmware image distribution.
The Firmware Update Start message is an acknowledged message used to start
a firmware update on a Firmware Update Server.
The Light LC Property Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to
set the Light LC Property state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Firmware Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Server to report the status of an operation on a stored firmware image.
The Firmware Distribution Upload Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Server to report the status of a firmware image upload.
The message Op Code.
A base protocol for unacknowledged vendor message.
A Private Beacon Set message is an acknowledged message used to set the
Private Beacon state and the Random Update Interval Steps state of a Node.
A base protocol for sensor property messages.
A base protocol for messages sent as responses to
s.
Light LC Property Get is an acknowledged message used to get the Light LC Property
state of an Element.
Message will be sent with 32-bit Transport MIC.
Light LC Light OnOff Get is an acknowledged message used to get the
Light LC State Machine Light OnOff state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Receivers Add message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to add new entries to the Distribution Receivers List state of
a Firmware Distribution Server.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Stop message is an acknowledged message that is used
by the Remote Provisioning Client to terminate the Remote Provisioning Scan procedure.
A
message is an unacknowledged message used to report
the current SAR Transmitter state of a Node.
Index of this Application Key, in range from 0 through to 4095.
A base protocol for static unacknowledged vendor message.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Capabilities Get message is an acknowledged message
used by the Remote Provisioning Client to get the value of the Remote Provisioning
Scan Capabilities state.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Capabilities Status message is an unacknowledged
message used by the Remote Provisioning Server to report the current value of
the Remote Provisioning Scan Capabilities state of a Remote Provisioning Server.
The base class for response messages with an opcode known at the
compilation time.
A
message is an acknowledged message used to get
the current SAR Transmitter state of a Node.
A Private Node Identity Status message is an unacknowledged message used to
report the current Private Node Identity state for a subnet.
A
message is an acknowledged message used to get
the current SAR Receiver state of a Node.
A base protocol for all Configuration messages.
The Firmware Update Firmware Metadata Status message is an unacknowledged message
sent to a Firmware Update Client that is used to report whether a Firmware Update Server can
accept a firmware update.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Report message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to report the scanned Device UUID of an
unprovisioned device.
A Remote Provisioning Extended Scan Report message is an unacknowledged message
used by the Remote Provisioning Server to report the advertising data requested
by the client in a Remote Provisioning Extended Scan Start message.
The Firmware Distribution Firmware Delete message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to delete a stored firmware image on a Firmware Distribution Server.
A
message is an acknowledged message used to set the SAR Transmitter
state of a Node.
The Light CTL Temperature Range Get is an acknowledged message used to get
the Light CTL Temperature Range state of an Element.
A Health Period Get is an acknowledged message used to get the current Health Fast Period Divisor
state of an Element.
Light CTL Temperature Status is an unacknowledged message used to report
the Light CTL Temperature and Light CTL Delta UV state of an Element.
A base protocol for static vendor message.
A mesh message containing the operation status.
Light CTL Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the
Light CTL Lightness state, Light CTL Temperature state, and the Light CTL Delta UV
state of an Element.
A Health Attention Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the current
Attention Timer state of an Element.
Light LC Mode Get is an acknowledged message used to get the
Light LC Mode state of an Element.
A
is an acknowledged message used to add an
to the NetKey List on a Node.
Returns whether the message should be sent or has been sent using
32-bit or 64-bit TransMIC value. By default
is returned.
A base protocol for config status messages.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Start message is an acknowledged message that is
used by the Remote Provisioning Client to start the Remote Provisioning Scan
procedure, which finds unprovisioned devices within immediate radio range of
the Remote Provisioning Server.
A Health Attention Get is an acknowledged message used to get the current Attention Timer state
of an Element.
A base protocol for vendor status message.
A Health Fault Clear Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to clear the current Registered Fault
state identified by Company ID of an Element.
The base class for unacknowledged messages.
The Firmware Distribution Upload Get message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to check the status of a firmware image upload to
a Firmware Distribution Server.
A
is an acknowledged message used to report all
s
known to the Node that are bound to the given
The Firmware Distribution Firmware Get By Index message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to check which firmware image is stored in a particular entry in the
Firmware Images List state on a Firmware Distribution Server.
The Firmware Update Information Status message is an unacknowledged message
used to report information about firmware images installed on a Node.
Index of this Network Key, in range from 0 through to 4095.
The base class for vendor response messages.
A base protocol for config messages related to Network Key and Application Key.
A base protocol for acknowledged Remote Provisioning messages.
A base protocol for unacknowledged Configuration messages.
The Light CTL Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light CTL Lightness and the Light CTL Temperature state of an Element.
A Remote Provisioning PDU Outbound Report message is an unacknowledged message
used by the Remote Provisioning Server to report completion of the delivery
of the Provisioning PDUs that the Remote Provisioning Server either sends to
a device that is being provisioned or processes locally during the
Device Key Refresh procedure, the Node Address Refresh procedure,
or the Node Composition Refresh procedure.
A base protocol for config messages with list of Model subscription addresses.
The Light CTL Temperature Set is an acknowledged message used to set the
Light CTL Temperature state and the Light CTL Delta UV state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Receivers Get message is an acknowledged message sent by
the Firmware Distribution Client to get the firmware distribution status of each Target Node.
A
message is an acknowledged message used to set the SAR Receiver state of a
Node.
A Health Period Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the current Health Fast
Period Divisor state of an Element.
Provision, configure and control Bluetooth mesh devices with nRF Mesh library.
A base protocol for time messages.
The Light LC Occupancy Mode Set is an acknowledged message used to set the
Light LC Occupancy Mode state of an Element.
The Light LC Mode Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light LC Mode state of an Element.
A Remote Provisioning Scan Get message is an acknowledged message that is used
by the Remote Provisioning Client to get the various scanning states of a
Remote Provisioning Server model.
The Light LC Light OnOff Set is an acknowledged message used to set the
Light LC Light OnOff state of an Element.
A Health Fault Clear is an acknowledged message used to clear the current Registered Fault
state identified by Company ID of an Element.
A Remote Provisioning Link Get message is an acknowledged message used by the
Remote Provisioning Client to get the Remote Provisioning Link state of a
Remote Provisioning Server model.
The Firmware Distribution Upload Start message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to start a firmware image upload to a Firmware Distribution Server.
A base protocol for config messages related to Models, where the Model can be
a vendor model.
The Firmware Distribution Receivers List message is an unacknowledged message sent by
the Firmware Distribution Server to report the firmware distribution status of each receiver.
The Firmware Distribution Upload OOB Start message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to start a firmware image upload to a Firmware Distribution Server
using an Out of Band (OOB) mechanism.
The base class for unacknowledged messages with an opcode known at the
compilation time.
A Health Fault Test is an acknowledged message used to invoke a self-test procedure of an Element.
A base protocol for location status messages.
A base protocol for all Remote Provisioning messages.
The mesh message security enum determines authentication level
which shall be used when encrypting a segmented mesh message.
A Private GATT Proxy Get message is an acknowledged message used to get the
current Private GATT Proxy state of a Node.
The Light LC Property Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light LC Property state of an Element.
A base protocol for config messages with list of Application Keys.
A
is an acknowledged message used to delete an
from the NetKey List on a Node.
A type of a mesh message which opcode is known during compilation time.
A Remote Provisioning Extended Scan Start message is an unacknowledged message
that is used by the Remote Provisioning Client to request additional information
about a specific unprovisioned device or about the Remote Provisioning Server itself.
A Private Node Identity Set message is an acknowledged message used to set the
current Private Node Identity state for a subnet.
The Light LC Light OnOff Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light LC State Machine Light OnOff state of an Element.
A Health Current Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the Current Health
state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Cancel message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to stop the firmware image distribution from a Firmware Distribution Server.
The Firmware Distribution Capabilities Get message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to get the capabilities of a Firmware Distribution Server.
A
is an acknowledged message used to delete an
from the AppKey List on a Node.
A Remote Provisioning Link Status message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to acknowledge a Remote Provisioning Link Get
message, a Remote Provisioning Link Open message, or a Remote Provisioning
Link Close message.
A base protocol for config messages related to Models.
The base class of every mesh message. Mesh messages can be sent to and
received from a mesh network.
A base protocol for Remote Provisioning messages reporting link state.
The base class for acknowledged messages.
A Remote Provisioning PDU Report message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to report the Provisioning PDU that either was
received from the device being provisioned or was generated locally during the
Device Key Refresh procedure, the Node Address Refresh procedure, or the
Node Composition Refresh procedure.
A base protocol for a message that can initiate a non-immediate
state transition.
A base protocol for config messages related to Elements.
A Health Attention Set is an acknowledged message used to set the current Attention Timer state
of an Element.
Light CTL Temperature Range Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message
used to set the Light CTL Temperature Range state of an Element.
A
is an unacknowledged message used to report a status for
the requesting message, based on the
identifying the
on the NetKey List and on the
identifying

on the AppKey List.
A
is an unacknowledged message used to report the status of
the operation on the NetKey List.
The Firmware Update Get message is an acknowledged message used
to get the current status of the Firmware Update Server.
A Health Period Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the Health Fast Period Divisor state of an Element.
A
is an acknowledged message used to update an
value on the AppKey List on a Node.
A Health Fault Get is an acknowledged message used to get the current Registered Fault
state identified by Company ID of an Element.
Light CTL Temperature Range Set is an acknowledged message used to set the
Light CTL Temperature Range state of an Element.
A base protocol for config status messages.
A base class for acknowledged messages which opcode and the type of the
response message are known during compilation time.
A Remote Provisioning Link Report message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Server to report the state change of a provisioning
bearer link or the Node Provisioning Protocol Interface.
The Light LC Mode Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the
Light LC Mode state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Get message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to get the state of the firmware image distribution on
a Firmware Distribution Server.
The Firmware Distribution Receivers Status message is an unacknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Server to report the size of the Distribution Receivers List state.
A
is an acknowledged message used to report all
s
known to the Node.
A Private GATT Proxy Status message is an unacknowledged message used to report
the current Private GATT Proxy state of a Node.
A Remote Provisioning PDU Send message is an unacknowledged message used by
the Remote Provisioning Client to deliver the Provisioning PDU to an
unprovisioned device or to the Node Provisioning Protocol Interface.
A
is an acknowledged message used to add an
to the AppKey List on a Node and bind it to the
identified by
The base class for vendor response messages.
A Remote Provisioning Link Open message is an acknowledged message used by the
Remote Provisioning Client to establish the provisioning bearer between a node
supporting the Remote Provisioning Server model and an unprovisioned device,
or to open the Node Provisioning Protocol Interface.
a base protocol for scene status messages.
The Firmware Update Cancel message is an acknowledged message used to
cancel a firmware update and delete any stored information about the update
on a Firmware Update Server.
The Light LC Light OnOff Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message
used to set the Light LC Light OnOff state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Firmware Get message is an acknowledged message sent by
a Firmware Distribution Client to check whether a specific firmware image is stored on
a Firmware Distribution Server.
A Health Attention Set Unacknowledged is an unacknowledged message used to set the current
Attention Timer state of an Element.
The Firmware Update Firmware Metadata Check message is an acknowledged message,
sent to a Firmware Update Server, to check whether the Node can accept a firmware update.
A base protocol for config messages with an Address property.
A Private GATT Proxy Set message is an acknowledged message used to set the
Private GATT Proxy state of a Node.
A base protocol for generic status messages.
A base protocol for config messages related to Network Keys.
The Light LC Mode Set is an acknowledged message used to set the Light LC Mode
state of an Element.
Light CTL Get is an acknowledged message used to get the Light CTL Lightness
state and the Light CTL Temperature state of an Element.
A base protocol for config messages related to Application Keys.
A message with Transaction Identifier.
The LC Occupancy Mode Status is an unacknowledged message used to report the
Light LC Occupancy Mode state of an Element.
The Firmware Distribution Capabilities Status message is an unacknowledged message
sent by a Firmware Distribution Server to report Distributor capabilities.
The Network Keys are used to encrypt mesh messages on the Network Layer.
Light CTL Set is an acknowledged message used to set the Light CTL Lightness state,
Light CTL Temperature state, and the Light CTL Delta UV state of an Element.
